title: On the Home Guards who perished in the Defense of Lexington, Missouri.
content:
The men who here in harness died
 Fell not in vain, though in defeat.
 They by their end well fortified
 The Cause, and built retreat
 (With memory of their valor tried)
 For emulous hearts in many an after fray - 
 Hearts sore beset, which died at bay.
meaning:
"On the Home Guards who perished in the Defense of Lexington, Missouri." is a quintessential example of Herman Melville's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
